chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.S-55 of 2023 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 31.03.2023 Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Chandio advocate for petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, Addl. A.G Sindh. ----- Petitioner is seeking protection in accordance with law. Learned AAG present in court waives notice of this petition and submits that petitioner would be dealt with and protection as and when required would be provided in accordance with law. Learned counsel for the petitioners is satisfied and seeks disposal of this petition in the above terms, which is accordingly disposed of along with pending applications. JUDGE Ali Haider
